title: List Response Envelope
description: The canonical HTTP response shape for paginated list endpoints. Every list endpoint on every service returns this shape.
$comment: JSON Schema draft 2020-12. Seam 3 (Data). Producer: every HTTP surface. Consumer: every HTTP client. Aligns with Laravel's LengthAwarePaginator + spatie/laravel-data wrap='data' convention. The 'data' item shape varies per endpoint and is documented in the endpoint's OpenAPI operation.

data.description: The list of items on the current page. Item shape varies per endpoint.

items.description: Placeholder — actual item shape is documented per endpoint in OpenAPI.

meta.description: Pagination metadata for the current response.

current_page.description: 1-indexed page number for the current response.

per_page.description: Number of items per page. Every endpoint documents its own max; the schema-wide cap is 500.

total.description: Total number of items across every page.

last_page.description: 1-indexed page number of the last page. Equal to ceil(total / per_page).

from.description: 1-indexed row number of the first item on the current page. Null when the page is empty.

to.description: 1-indexed row number of the last item on the current page. Null when the page is empty.

links.description: Optional URL links to sibling pages. Every URL is absolute + includes any active filter / sort / include query params.

first.description: URL to the first page. Null when there's only one page.

last.description: URL to the last page. Null when there's only one page.

prev.description: URL to the previous page. Null on the first page.

next.description: URL to the next page. Null on the last page.
